title: Single reliable barge-in + speech pipeline
statement: A single reliable audio pipeline, used by every narrating surface, that reliably detects barge-in, distinguishes the user from background noise and the app's own voice, classifies the barge-in as a command or an engagement, and meets target latency, proven by a repeatable measurement.
authority_note: The on-device real-acoustic run is the source of truth for whether the goal is met. The simulator-injection run is a fast, repeatable proxy for regression detection and CI; it cannot prove the goal because it does not exercise real microphone, speaker echo, or hardware latency.

criteria.label: Barge-in reaction latency (median)
criteria.definition: User speech onset to AI playback paused (tentative).

criteria.label: Barge-in reaction latency (P95)
criteria.definition: User speech onset to AI playback paused (tentative), 95th percentile.

criteria.label: STT time-to-first-partial (median)
criteria.definition: User speech onset to first partial STT transcript.

criteria.label: Barge-in detection recall
criteria.definition: Fraction of real barge-in utterances that are detected and confirmed.

criteria.label: Noise/echo false-positive rate
criteria.definition: Fraction of non-barge-in audio (background-noise scenes and the app's own TTS) that wrongly triggers a confirmed barge-in.

criteria.label: Command-vs-engagement accuracy
criteria.definition: Macro F1 of the command/engagement label on the labeled corpus.

criteria.label: Peak memory during measurement
criteria.definition: Peak resident memory while running the measurement suite. Advisory, reported not gated; true 90-minute memory-growth budget is a separate long-run check.

criteria.label: Thermal state during measurement
criteria.definition: Worst ProcessInfo thermal state observed. Advisory.

notes: A green run on too few samples is not proof. Every result reports sample counts; rate/F1 criteria below their min_samples are reported as INCONCLUSIVE, not PASS.
If the device run shows the fallback STT cannot hit the latency targets, revisit targets per device tier rather than silently failing.
Criteria target the Target tier chosen 2026-06-01. Changing the bar means editing this file; the skill and goal feature both read it.
